prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph, moment of excitement. Same London suburban living room, evening. Marcus (13-year-old Mixed race boy, short hair, sporty outfit) leans forward from the sofa, pointing enthusiastically at the TV with his right arm extended. His face shows genuine excitement and a big smile — the joy of choosing. Next to him, Zara (16, Mixed race girl, wavy hair) has a small amused smile. James (44, White British father) looks on with a warm grin. The TV in the background is a bright blur of light (content not visible). The pointing gesture is the hero of the frame. Color grading: warm evening tones matching IP-06. Film-like desaturation. Marcus's excited expression is the emotional focal point. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Marcus's pointing gesture dominates center-frame. The extended arm creates a strong diagonal toward the blurred TV. Shallow depth of field — Marcus's face and hand sharp, TV is bright bokeh. Family members softer in the periphery. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 400. Film grain. The dynamic moment has a slight sense of captured motion — Marcus leaning forward. TV light illuminates his profile. The mood is 'I chose this one!' — pure childhood agency. The Social Job achieved. A warm family moment where a 13-year-old feels empowered.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, calm/static pose, stock photo, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
